welcome_offer.description: Earn 100,000 TrueBlue points after spending $5,000 in the first 90 days. Verify annual-fee payment and Premier-card terms before applying.
notes: High-priority new JetBlue Premier adaptor. Local data card for Premier does not exist yet; temporarily points at JetBlue base data card until a dedicated data/cards/barclays-jetblue-premier.json is created.
source_conflicts: Dedicated production card data file is missing.

open_questions: Create a dedicated data/cards/barclays-jetblue-premier.json before applying production changes.
Confirm annual fee and all Premier-specific benefits from issuer page.

Resolved: Barclays/JetBlue have a dedicated JetBlue Premier Card product with $499 annual fee and 100k after $5k + annual fee paid in first 90 days; create dedicated data card before production apply.
Dedicated production data card created 2026-06-30; run validation before applying further automated updates.

community.summary: Resolved: JetBlue Premier is a distinct Barclays product, not JetBlue Plus/base. It should become a dedicated production card.

observations.excerpt: Barclays Premier page should show 100k TrueBlue terms and Premier-specific annual fee/benefits.
